tests.description: generateFractalGeometry with faceSubdivision returns FractalOutput with positions as Float32Array
generateFractalGeometry with branchingGrowth returns FractalOutput with positions as Float32Array
faceSubdivision is deterministic — same seed and config produce identical output
branchingGrowth is deterministic — same seed and config produce identical output
different seeds produce different output for faceSubdivision
assertions: result_a.positions does not deep equal result_b.positions

tests.description: different seeds produce different output for branchingGrowth
assertions: result_a.positions does not deep equal result_b.positions

tests.description: faceSubdivision produces non-empty output for each valid depth (3, 4, 5, 6)
branchingGrowth produces non-empty output for each valid depth (3, 4, 5, 6)
point count stays within pointBudget for faceSubdivision
point count stays within pointBudget for branchingGrowth
edge count stays within bounds and edges format is correct (edgeCount * 6 floats)
assertions: result.edges is instanceof Float32Array or null
If result.edges is not null: result.edges.length equals result.edgeCount * 6

tests.description: all coordinates in positions are finite (no NaN or Infinity) for faceSubdivision
assertions: Every value in result.positions satisfies Number.isFinite()

tests.description: all coordinates in positions are finite (no NaN or Infinity) for branchingGrowth
assertions: Every value in result.positions satisfies Number.isFinite()

tests.description: all coordinates in edges are finite (no NaN or Infinity)
assertions: If result.edges is not null: every value in result.edges satisfies Number.isFinite()

tests.description: depth is clamped — depth < 3 treated as 3
assertions: generateFractalGeometry with depth=1 produces same output as depth=3 (same seed/strategy/budget)
generateFractalGeometry with depth=0 produces same output as depth=3 (same seed/strategy/budget)

tests.description: depth is clamped — depth > 6 treated as 6
assertions: generateFractalGeometry with depth=10 produces same output as depth=6 (same seed/strategy/budget)
generateFractalGeometry with depth=99 produces same output as depth=6 (same seed/strategy/budget)

tests.description: zero or negative pointBudget returns empty output
faceSubdivision and branchingGrowth produce visually distinct point distributions
assertions: Axis standard deviations differ between the two strategies (at least one axis stdDev ratio > 1.3 or < 0.7)
Centroid positions differ between the two strategies OR bounding box aspect ratios differ

tests.description: no stack overflow at max depth (depth=6) with large pointBudget
assertions: generateFractalGeometry with depth=6 and pointBudget=50000 does not throw
Result has pointCount > 0 and all positions are finite

tests.description: selectStrategy returns a valid FractalStrategy and is deterministic
assertions: selectStrategy('seed-a') called twice returns the same result
selectStrategy produces both strategies across a range of seeds (coverage)

tests.description: randoms field is present in output and has correct length for wireframe compatibility
assertions: All values in result.randoms are finite and in [0, 1)

tests.description: output positions fit within expected radius (~2.5)
assertions: For every vertex: sqrt(x² + y² + z²) <= 3.0 (small tolerance above 2.5)
Test for both faceSubdivision and branchingGrowth

tests.description: computeFractalDepth returns value in [3, maxDepth] range and is deterministic
assertions: Same seed and maxDepth produce same result

tests.description: FRACTAL_STRATEGIES array contains exactly faceSubdivision and branchingGrowth
faceSubdivision output has 3D volumetric spread (non-coplanar points)
assertions: stdDev of X, Y, and Z axes are all > 0.05
min(stdX, stdY, stdZ) > 0.05 confirming non-coplanar distribution

tests.description: branchingGrowth output has 3D volumetric spread (non-coplanar points)
assertions: stdDev of X, Y, and Z axes are all > 0.05
min(stdX, stdY, stdZ) > 0.05 confirming non-coplanar distribution

tests.description: higher depth produces more points (given sufficient pointBudget)
assertions: result at depth=5 has pointCount >= result at depth=3 (same seed, large budget)
Test for both faceSubdivision and branchingGrowth

tests.description: QualityProfile includes maxFractalDepth field
maxFractalDepth per tier: low=3, medium=4, high=6
maxFractalDepth scales with tier (low < medium < high)
